from django.http import JsonResponse
from django.views import View

from .models import Product


class BulkPriceUpdateView(View):
    def post(self, request):
        price_changes = request.POST.getlist("changes")
        products = Product.objects.filter(
            id__in=[c["product_id"] for c in price_changes]
        )
        price_map = {c["product_id"]: c["new_price"] for c in price_changes}
        for product in products:
            product.price = price_map[product.id]
        Product.objects.bulk_update(products, ["price"])
        return JsonResponse({"updated": [p.id for p in products]})
